# IOI Oleochemical

> IOI Oleochemical Industries Berhad is a leading manufacturer of oleochemical products derived from sustainable palm oil, serving diverse industrial and consumer applications globally.

The site is available in English (/en/) and Simplified Chinese (/cn/). Canonical URLs use /en/ or /cn/ prefixes.

## About

- [About Us](https://www.ioioleo.com/en/about-us)
- [Sustainability](https://www.ioioleo.com/en/sustainability)
- [CSR](https://www.ioioleo.com/en/csr)

## Products

- [Product Finder](https://www.ioioleo.com/en/product-finder)
- [Product Applications](https://www.ioioleo.com/en/product-application)

Individual product pages use the pattern:
`https://www.ioioleo.com/en/detail_product.html?slug={product-slug}`

## Sustainability

- [Policies and Statements](https://www.ioioleo.com/en/sustainability/policies-and-statement)
- [Responsible Sourcing and Traceability](https://www.ioioleo.com/en/sustainability/responsible-sourcing-traceability)
- [Environmental and Climate Management](https://www.ioioleo.com/en/sustainability/environmental-climate-management)
- [Employee Welfare](https://www.ioioleo.com/en/sustainability/employee-welfare)
- [Awards](https://www.ioioleo.com/en/sustainability/awards)
- [Digital Sustainability](https://www.ioioleo.com/en/sustainability/digital-sustainability)
